Alright guys, so this is the blog boomerang play and this is very very similar to the video boomerang play except with that first campaign we're sending traffic to a blog post on your site to build that custom audience into pixel people versus using the actual video in the ad. This is also good for you if your cold piece of content leads seamlessly into your warm piece of content and and that warm offer that you're going to make. So similar to what Russ talked about you want to make sure that this cold piece of content is actually leading people down the value journey right so we don't want to send traffic to this piece of content and pixel a bunch of people that don't want whatever the next step in your journey is so we want to make sure that this cold piece of content leads seamlessly into your warm piece of content that essentially it's the logical next step in their journey with you. It's also best if you have patience to allow the custom audience to grow and then retarget and if you have a bit more experience running ads since this is a two campaign play.
